Details

! Warning The Planning Team is working hard to publish comments as quickly as possible however given the number we will receive your comment may not appear online for some time. Rest assured comments are available to the planning officer from the minute you submit and will be taken into consideration.
A paper copy of this application will be available to view from 10 February 2025 in the Housing Welfare and Advice Service at Lewis House, Manvers Street, Bath, BA1 1JG.
! Warning Please note that the Planning Team is working hard to publish comments as quickly as possible however given the number received your comment may take longer to appear online. Rest assured comments are available to the planning officer from the minute you submit and will be taken into consideration.

Proposal

Felling of 4 trees in the conservation area situated in the front garden of 5 Bailbrook Lane. Comments

The Comments tab lists all public comments received on this application (not statutory consultees, e.g. The Environment Agency, Highways DC, etc). The majority of comments are submitted via our Comments Form through the website and you can expand the comment to view all of the text by clicking on the plus button. A minority of comments are submitted by post or email and it is not possible to include all the text here, however when you expand the comment you will see a link to our Associated Documents page where you can search for the comment.

Name Comment Type Date

Plans and Documents

Prior to decision or at appeal stage a full list of public comments received for this application is available on the View Comments page. We only publish public comments on the documents page where they have been submitted by post or email.

Documents may be large and take some time to download. Files are in PDF format, Word and Excel formats, download the latest PDF viewer. 

Increase the list of documents displayed on this page by changing the Display drop down menu. Use the drop-down menus at the top of each column below to sort alphabetically or the date order.

Copyright

Plans, drawings and material submitted to the council are protected by the copyright acts (section 47, 1988 act). You may only use material which is downloaded and/or printed for consultation purposes, to compare current applications with previous schemes and to check whether developments have been completed in accordance with approved plans. Further copies must not be made without the prior permission of the copyright owner.
